---
title: "People"
---

## Principal Investigator

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="12%"}
![](files/PhillipSchmutz.jpg){
  fig-alt="Photo of Phillip Schmutz"
  .profile-circle
}
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}

:::

::: {.column width="83%"}

**Phillip Schmutz, PhD**  
Assocaite Professor, Department of Earth & Environmental Sciences <Br>
University of West Florida  
pschmutz[at]uwf.edu

:::


## Graduate Students

**Gabby Westerfield**<br>
Thesis: Wrack as Natural Infrastructure: Elevation Change, Sediment Trapping, and Public Perceptions

**Maggie Darbyshire**<br>
Thesis: Ecogeomorphic Controls on Coastal Dune Morphology Across Managed and Unmanaged Shorelines


## Undergraduate Researchers

**Lucia Dillersberger**<br>
Honors Thesis: Accuracy of Different GPS Data Collection Methods for Drone-Based Dune Research

**Gabby Beemer**<br>
Honors Thesis: From Disturbance to Recovery: Long-Term Vegetation Response to Dune Trampling



## Alumni
### Graduate Students

| Name | Year | Thesis | Current Position |
|----------|----|------------------------------|-----------------|
| Halie Weatherington | 2026 | Comparative Analysis of Pseudo-Absence Statistical Ratios in Relation to Sea Turtle Nesting Preferences | CEI Inspector @ Metric Engineering |
| Jordan Lewis | 2025 | Using a Thermal Unoccupied Aerial Vehicle to Detect Submarine Groundwater Discharge in Escambia Bay, Florida | Railroad Commission of Texas |
| Divina Cox | 2025 | Examine the Influnece of Beach Morphology on Sea Turtle Nesting Behavior in the Years 2010, 2016, and 2020 on Santa Rosa Island and Perdido Key, FL | Ph.D. Student @ UC Santa Barbara |
| Madison Williams | 2022 | The Spatial Variability of Sea Turtle Nest Sites Related to Beach Geomorphology Characteristics on Pensacola Beach and Gulf Islands National Seashore, FL | Restoration Coordinator for the Panhandle Dune Ecosystem Project - FWC |
| Marley Allen | 2019 | Influence of Sand Fence Configuration on Sand Accumulation and Wind Flow | Ph.D Student @ the University of New Orleans |
| Chloe Jackson | 2019 | Exposure of the Property Protection Service to Environmental Stressors in the Gulf of Mexico | Ph.D. Student @ Boston University |
| Meagan Russell | 2018 | Application of an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle to Assess Dune Vulnerability| Program Coordinator for STEM Scholars at UWF |

### Undergraduate Students
| Name | Year | Thesis | Current Position |
|----------|----|------------------------------|-----------------|
| Joe Agin | 2024 | The Spatial Variability of Sea Turtle Nest Sites Related to Beach Geomorphology Characteristics on Pensacola Beach and Gulf Islands National Seashore, FL | Project Scientists @ PPM Consultants, Inc |
| Liliana Blouin | 2024 | The Spatial Variability of Sea Turtle Nest Sites Related to Beach Geomorphology Characteristics on Pensacola Beach and Gulf Islands National Seashore, FL | Graduate Students @ Manchester Metropolitan University, UK |
| Kyle Allen | 2023 | Quantifying Seasonal Change in a Coastal Dune System using a UAV on Pensacola Beach, Florida | Environmental Scientist @ Raba Kistner, Inc. |
| Lexi Nelson | 2019 | The Utility of Using a Near-Infrared (NIR) Camera to Measure Beach Surface Moisture | Data Scientist @ the Gulf Ecology Division of the EPA |
| Tynon (Ty) Briggs | 2018 | Calculating Aeolian Sediment Transport Relative to The Presence of Gravel Lag | Environmental Consultant |
